archetype.name: Beastmaster
archetype.note: This archetype offers Animal Empathy (Ranger) at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Wild Mimic
archetype.note: This archetype offers Animal Empathy (Ranger) at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Animal Empathy (Ranger)
feat.text: You have a connection to the creatures of the natural world that allows you to communicate with them on a rudimentary level. You can use Diplomacy to Make an Impression on animals and to make very simple Requests of them. In most cases, wild animals will give you time to make your case.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
